subcodes.first_line: O My Beloved One, O Name of Bounty! Upon Thee be the glory of God and the glory of all who dwell in existence, both seen and unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محبوبی یا اسم الجود علیک بهاء الله و بهاء من فی الوجود من الغیب و الشهود
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God
